summary.best_cold_start_note: Popularity works for users with no history; ContentBased works for declared preferences and similar-movie discovery.

notes.rmse_mae_note: RMSE/MAE are mainly meaningful for rating prediction models such as MF and UserCF.
notes.full_ranking_note: Full-ranking evaluates recommendations from the whole catalog and is strict, so values are usually lower.
notes.sampled_random_note: Random sampled-ranking is useful but can make popularity baselines look strong when negatives are too easy.
notes.sampled_popaware_note: Popularity-aware sampled-ranking samples harder negatives from similar popularity buckets and better tests personalized ranking.
